item.name: Apache kafka Create or Update Connector Config

request.name: Apache kafka Create or Update Connector Config

description.content:
The Kafka Connect REST API provides endpoints for managing connectors, their configurations, tasks, and offsets. Kafka Connect is a framework for connecting Kafka with external systems such as databases, key-value stores, search indexes, and file systems.

Contact Support:
 Name: Apache Kafka
